title: Ubiquiti UP-AI-Horn-Speaker, AI Horn Speaker, white

description: The Ubiquiti UP-AI-Horn-Speaker is a smart network speaker with a volume of 120 dB, designed for integration with the UniFi Protect platform. It is a suitable addition to AI-enabled cameras and enhances your security system with an acoustic alert function for various events Device Wall mount Pole mount Weatherproof cable gland Mounting accessories
